scripts.build:arcade: cross-env VITE_DISTRIBUTION=arcade tsc -b && cross-env VITE_DISTRIBUTION=arcade vite build && node scripts/build-release.mjs && node scripts/verify-release.mjs
scripts.build:cap: cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true tsc -b && cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true vite build
scripts.build:cap:debug: cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true tsc -b && cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true vite build --mode development
scripts.android:build: npm run build:cap:debug && npx cap sync android && node scripts/android-gradle.js assembleDebug
scripts.android:deploy: npm run android:build && npm run android:install
scripts.android:release: npm run bump-version && npm run build:cap && npx cap sync android && node scripts/android-gradle.js bundleRelease
scripts.android:release:apk: npm run bump-version && npm run build:cap && npx cap sync android && node scripts/android-gradle.js assembleRelease
scripts.toss:build: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=toss tsc -b && cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=toss npx ait build
